title: Monday.com Consultant/Expert - Client Management/Time Tracking
excerpt:

posts.author: bpaulin (Benjamin Paulin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

We are trying to find ways to minimize future employee burnout while also gaining a better understanding of what we are doing for each of our clients and how much time employees are spending doing work for individual clients.

I am looking for a consultant/expert who can help us in the following areas:

  1. Add a “time” field to Kanban, set to two hours by default but changeable by us and make sure Kanban projects are assigned to a CLIENT

  2. Add a “time” field to “project” boards and ensure it is connected to a CLIENT entry

  3. Add another Kanban style board for “Special Events/Projects” that we can start to use to track work/progress and, time and have each item connected to a specific client.

  4. Anything else you can think of to help us track the time employees are spending doing work for individual clients.

  5. Create a “client time management” board where we can see a recap of everything on the other boards. So that we can easily view each client and what we did for them in a given time period, how many hours we gave them, and who did work for them.

Thanks!

-Ben

posts.author: Ricky.Tomer (Ricky Tomer)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey there @bpaulin and welcome to the monday.com community forums!

This sounds like a very interesting project and I would be curious to see how the team at CarbonWeb might be able to help. We like to take our projects one step at a time and with the wish list you have I think there is certainly some ways we can help.

If you’d like to schedule a consultation with me please do so here: Consultation - Ricky

Good luck as you move forward.

Best regards,

Ricky Tomer
